ham: Dear patient, this is a reminder that your appointment with Dr. Sharma is scheduled for 10:00 AM on 15th May at XYZ Hospital. Please arrive 15 minutes early. For any questions, reply YES to confirm.
spam: Hi, you have been selected for a 100% income tax refund! Your account ID 123456789 was flagged. Please send your bank details to <URL> to claim your money immediately. Reply STOP to decline.
